'''Brudi Gayn''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] and freelance [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]].

==Biography==
In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], Gayn was hired by [[Cash Garrulan]] to pilot a [[CloakShape fighter/Legends|CloakShape Fighter]], transporting [[Roan Shryne]] and [[Olee Starstone]] from [[Murkhana/Legends|Murkhana]] to the ''[[Drunk Dancer]]''.

{{Char-stub}}
